title: Anthropic vs OpenAI: An Investor Shift
snippet: Ken Smythe, Founder of Next Round Capital joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the surprising shift in AI investing. He explains why OpenAI shares are flooding the market, how Anthropic is emerging as a stronger…
contentText: Ken Smythe, Founder of Next Round Capital joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the surprising shift in AI investing. He explains why OpenAI shares are flooding the market, how Anthropic is emerging as a stronger financial bet, and why OpenAI’s massive $122B funding round may not be as real as it sounds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia App adds 'Auto Shader Compilation' for faster load times in games — beta feature automatically recompiles shaders in the background after every driver update
snippet: The Nvidia App can now automatically recompile shaders for you in the background after every GPU driver update. This should save gamers several minutes across different titles, especially blockbuster ones, where shader…
contentText: The Nvidia App can now automatically recompile shaders for you in the background after every GPU driver update. This should save gamers several minutes across different titles, especially blockbuster ones, where shader compilation can often delay your session. You still need to compile shaders for the first time after a new install, however.
